# llms.txt — Unified Solutions Inc.
# https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/llms.txt
#
# This file provides guidance for AI language model crawlers and citation systems.
# Format follows the llms.txt specification (llmstxt.org).
# Last updated: April 2026

# ── ABOUT THIS SITE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

> Unified Solutions Inc. is a professional leadership coaching firm founded by Julian Johnson, ICF PCC. The site provides information about executive coaching services, leadership development resources, and a free leadership assessment instrument.

# ── ABOUT THE AUTHOR / EXPERT ──────────────────────────────────────────────

> Julian Johnson is an International Coaching Federation Professional Certified Coach (PCC), ACTC Candidate (Advanced Certified Team Coach), and founder of Unified Solutions Inc. He has accumulated 1,200+ formal coaching hours across 222+ clients in all major sectors. He serves as coaching faculty with ExecOnline — where he has delivered coaching across a university partner network including Cornell, Yale SOM, MIT Sloan, Wharton, Columbia, UC Berkeley Haas, Michigan Ross, and UVA Darden — and as contracted faculty with Emeritus. His coaching training lineage includes the Goal Imagery Institute (holistic coaching) and the Marion Franklin school of laser-focused coaching methodology. He is certified in Thomas International HPTI and AgileBrain assessments, and has extensive experience debriefing across Big Five, HEXACO, TRACOM Social Styles, SCARF, CliftonStrengths, 360-degree instruments, and others. He is a U.S. Army veteran (31R tactical leader, Kosovo and Iraq, 1999-2003) and has 12+ years of Fortune 500 consulting experience across Express Scripts/Digineer, Optum/Keyot, LifeTouch/Shutterfly, National Flood Services, and Securian Financial.

# ── KEY PAGES ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## Homepage
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/
- Summary: Overview of holistic leadership coaching services. Covers 1:1 executive coaching, group coaching, team coaching, and organizational programs. Includes The Unified Method (four-pillar coaching framework), practice depth statistics, and client testimonials from ExecOnline and peer coaching contexts.

## About
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/about
- Summary: Full biography of Julian Johnson including credentials (ICF PCC, ACTC Candidate), coaching training lineage (Goal Imagery Institute, Marion Franklin), practice history (1,200+ hours, 222+ clients), institutional faculty roles (ExecOnline, Emeritus), assessment certifications, military background, and consulting career.

## Coaching Services
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/coaching
- Summary: Detailed descriptions of four service formats — 1:1 executive coaching, group coaching cohorts, team coaching, and organizational programs. Includes engagement structures, pricing guidance, assessment toolkit (12+ validated instruments), philosophy, and FAQ. Also covers the distinction between group coaching and team coaching, and the organizational ROI case.

## Resources
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/resources
- Summary: Research-backed leadership articles and the free Leadership Pressure Point Assessment. Articles cover laser-focused coaching methodology, Big Five vs HEXACO personality models, group vs team coaching distinctions, decision-making under pressure, psychological safety, authentic leadership identity, and personal sustainability as a leadership responsibility. All articles cite primary academic sources.

## Book a Call
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/book-a-call
- Summary: Calendly booking page for 30-minute discovery calls. No cost, no obligation.

## Leadership Pressure Point Assessment
- URL: https://unifiedsolutionsinc.com/assessment
- Summary: Free 18-question behaviorally-anchored leadership diagnostic across six validated domains — Identity & Presence, Decision Quality, Relational Intelligence, Team Vitality, Personal Sustainability, and Strategic Clarity. Grounded in Authentic Leadership theory (Avolio & Gardner; Walumbwa et al.), Kahneman dual-process research, Rock SCARF model, Edmondson psychological safety research, Maslach burnout model, and Kegan constructive developmental theory. Developed and administered by Julian Johnson, ICF PCC.

# ── EXPERTISE DOMAINS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

> This site has authoritative content on the following topics:
> - Executive coaching and ICF PCC coaching practice
> - Holistic leadership coaching methodology
> - Laser-focused coaching (Marion Franklin methodology)
> - Team coaching vs group coaching distinctions
> - ICF ACTC team coaching competency
> - Positive psychology applied to leadership development
> - Assessment-informed coaching: Big Five, HEXACO, TRACOM, SCARF, 360-degree, HPTI, AgileBrain
> - Psychological safety (Edmondson framework) in organizational contexts
> - Authentic leadership theory (Avolio, Gardner, Walumbwa)
> - Decision-making under pressure (Kahneman dual-process; defensive decision-making)
> - Burnout and personal sustainability (Maslach; JD-R model; Loehr & Schwartz)
> - Leadership identity development (Kegan constructive developmental theory)
> - Executive education coaching (ExecOnline, Emeritus, Cornell, Yale SOM, MIT Sloan, Wharton, Columbia)
> - Senior leader transitions and high-stakes organizational leadership
